requirement_text: Use permitted textile fibre names and provide fibre-composition information.
evidence_examples: Bill of materials; supplier fibre declaration; final label artwork

trigger_description: More than one constituent textile fibre
requirement_text: State fibre names and percentages by weight in descending order.
evidence_examples: Bill of materials; fibre declaration; label artwork

trigger_description: Leather, down, horn, shell or similar component present
requirement_text: Indicate that the product contains non-textile parts of animal origin.

applies_to: Products sold in an EU Member State
trigger_description: Product is marketed to consumers in destination country
requirement_text: Provide required fibre information in the official language or languages required in the destination market.

trigger_description: Product is placed on the EU consumer market
requirement_text: Maintain product-safety analysis and technical documentation based on product characteristics and foreseeable use.
evidence_examples: Risk assessment; specifications; test reports; complaint/corrective-action process

trigger_description: Product is placed on the EU market
requirement_text: Provide product, type, batch or other identifying information that enables traceability.
evidence_examples: SKU; style; lot or batch identifier; manufacturing records

requirement_text: Provide manufacturer and relevant EU economic-operator contact information as required.
evidence_examples: Manufacturer details; importer or responsible-person agreement; packaging or accompanying information

trigger_description: Product is offered through an online listing
requirement_text: Make required product identification, economic-operator and safety information available in the online offer.
evidence_examples: Marketplace listing; product page export; responsible-operator details

applies_to: Dyed or printed textiles with relevant consumer contact
trigger_description: Dyes or prints may contain restricted azo colourants
requirement_text: Assess compliance with the current REACH restriction applicable to certain azo colourants and aromatic amines.
evidence_examples: Material/colour-linked laboratory report; supplier declaration; testing scope

applies_to: Clothing and related textiles in consumer skin contact
trigger_description: Relevant textile or garment has skin contact
requirement_text: Assess applicable substance-specific limits for restricted CMR substances in textiles.
evidence_examples: Material-specific chemical test package; supplier declaration with scope

applies_to: Metal parts with direct and prolonged skin contact
trigger_description: Buttons, rivets, zips or snaps may have prolonged contact
requirement_text: Assess the applicable nickel-release restriction for the component.

trigger_description: Leather patch, label or trim contacts skin
requirement_text: Assess the applicable chromium VI restriction for the leather component.

trigger_description: PVC print, badge, coating or other plasticised material is present
requirement_text: Assess applicable phthalate restrictions for the plasticised component.
Determine the appropriate EU Combined Nomenclature or TARIC classification from product characteristics.
evidence_examples: Product specification; construction; fibre composition; gender/age; classification memo

trigger_description: Destination and product classification are known
requirement_text: Retrieve current tariffs, taxes, procedures and applicable measures for the exact classification and origin.
evidence_examples: Dated Access2Markets or TARIC query result

trigger_description: Shipment is being prepared for customs clearance
requirement_text: Ensure commercial documents contain consistent parties, quantities, values, origin and product information.
evidence_examples: Commercial invoice; packing list; transport document
